title: Smart Contract Tools
description: Explore the best tools for building, testing, and deploying smart contracts on Ethereum.
banner-text: New to smart contracts? Start with our introduction to smart contracts.
footnote: Contract data sourced from Blockscout. Gas prices from Blocknative. Tooling maintained by OpenZeppelin.
empty-results: No tools found matching your criteria. Try adjusting your filters.

nested.section-description: Explore proxy contracts, upgradeable patterns, and gas optimization techniques.

subsection.label: Proxy Patterns
subsection.hint: Transparent, UUPS, and beacon proxy implementations.

multi-link-sentence: Deploy with Remix on Sepolia, verify on Blockscout, and audit with Defender.
tool-count: {count, plural, =0 {No tools found} one {# tool found} other {# tools found}}
deploy-status: {status, select, pending {Your deployment is pending confirmation} confirmed {Your contract has been deployed at {address}} failed {Deployment failed: {reason}} other {Unknown status}}
html-and-icu: You have {count, plural, one {# active contract} other {# active contracts}} on Blockscout.
dapp-description:
**Hardhat** is a professional-grade Ethereum development environment.

- **Compile**: Built-in Solidity compiler with caching.
- **Test**: Fast test runner with Mocha integration.
- **Deploy**: Scriptable deployment pipelines.

![Hardhat UI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NomicFoundation/hardhat/main/docs/.vuepress/public/hardhat-logo.png)

*Hardhat supports Ethereum, Polygon, and Arbitrum networks.*
